foundational.description: Prerequisite arithmetic, notation, and fluency (fractions, ratios, order of ops). Many core topics assume these skills.

core.description: Standard high-school units directly exercised on ACT Math (algebra, geometry, stats/probability).

advanced.description: Post-ACT / AP-level topics in the full 42-concept ontology. None are in the current ACT-tested set of 29.

cross_cutting.description: Meta-skills that span topics (representation translation, test strategy). Often have no single drill topic in a static multiple-choice bank.
